prompt: Create a bold streetwear fashion campaign poster with a gritty editorial collage aesthetic. Show a young man from the waist up seated behind a dark table, centered slightly right, with thick dark hair swept back, wearing a black leather biker jacket over a plain white t-shirt. His face is obscured by a rectangular censor-style blur block. His right hand is raised near his face, pinching a tiny gold building brick piece between thumb and index finger, while his left hand rests on the table. On the table, place exactly 1 partially assembled gold brick trophy on a green base at the lower right and exactly 18 scattered small gold brick pieces spread across the tabletop in front of him. Build the background as a layered black-and-electric-blue torn paper collage with rough ripped edges, distressed print texture, halftone dot patterns, white scribble marks, thin grid overlays, and sticker-like graphic elements in neon green, white, and black. Make the oversized headline dominate the left half in stacked typography reading “NO RULES.” in huge distressed white block letters, with a neon green X slashing across the O area, then “JUST” in large neon green hand-painted brush script, and “STYLE” in white brush script beneath it with a neon green underline. Add exactly 8 secondary sticker/text graphics around the composition: 1) top right black taped sticker reading “BREAK THE NORM” in white stacked text with a small neon green smiley face beside it, 2) mid right narrow white vertical label reading “STYLE IS FREEDOM”, 3) mid left black stacked sticker reading “OWN YOUR LOOK. OWN YOUR WORLD.”, 4) lower left blue torn-paper label reading “STREET CODE” with a barcode and small globe icon, 5) bottom center black strip reading “BUILT DIFFERENT.” with neon green script underneath reading “MADE TO STAND OUT.”, 6) bottom right neon green label reading “GLOBAL VIBES” with smaller text “LOCAL ATTITUDE” and a globe icon, 7) bottom right small black stamp reading “EST. 20XX” with tiny subtext, 8) lower left hand-drawn crown doodle. Also add several neon green X marks and white arrow/squiggle doodles as accent graphics. Use a high-contrast palette of electric blue, black, white, and neon green, with the gold bricks as warm metallic accents. The mood should feel youthful, confident, rebellious, energetic, and like a modern Instagram ad for a fashion-forward streetwear brand.
